credibility.subtitle: Ebyafaayo byaffe eby'omulembe
credibility.title: Ebivaamu si <gradient>bisuubizo</gradient>
credibility.description: Okuva e Sarajevo okutuuka e Oslo, Amsterdam ne Berlin. Abasuubuzi b'omu katale k'e Nakasero bafuna obudde obudde n'obudde obutuufu

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM for Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Architected the first-ever cloud-based One Identity infrastructure for Atlas Copco on Azure Kubernetes, reducing costs while keeping enterprise compliance.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Developed Azure Kubernetes infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and custom ServiceNow integration for Europe's leading cybersecurity firm.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Built GIS platform mapping underground utilities across Germany with collision detection preventing multi-million Euro infrastructure damage.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub ekulembera enkumi n'enkumi z'ebikozesebwa, Synapse ekozesa obuwumbi n'obuwumbi bw'ennyiriri za telemetry, ng'okugatta ku mayiro kukendeeza ku bbeeyi y'obubaka ~90%.

drone.label: Autonomous Drone Platform
drone.outcome: Custom flight controller with 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub bridge enabling autonomous BVLOS flights for agricultural monitoring and payload delivery.

payment.label: Payment System Rescue
payment.outcome: Rescued failing payment gateway for Norwegian mobile app by reverse-engineering undocumented legacy code. Zero payment downtime post-modernization.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Built Maya plugin that cut 3D modeling and animation time by 50% at a major AAA studio, adopted as a standard tool in the production pipeline.

social.label: Location-Based Social Platform
social.outcome: Architected dating app for Spain's nightlife scene with geolocation matching, real-time messaging, and push notifications for a UK client.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Built core backend for cloud-native identity governance platform serving Fortune 500 clients with custom ASP.NET Core Identity for NoSQL at enterprise scale.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: CET working hours with experience across Norway, Netherlands, Germany, and beyond.

yourEngineers.title: Omusuubuzi w'omu Ndeeba ssi muyimbi
yourEngineers.description: Dedicated team members embedded in your workflow and tools. No account managers, no ticket queues.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware to Cloud
hardwareToCloud.description: From embedded device firmware to enterprise Azure Synapse pipelines. Full-stack software across every layer.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native by Default

faq.subtitle: Knowledge Base
faq.title: <gradient>Ebibuuzo Ebitera Okubuuzibwa</gradient>
faq.description: Byonna by'olina okumanya ku kukola ne Horizon Tech

scope.question: Omulimu gwo guli ku ki?
scope.answer: We deliver end-to-end technology projects: custom enterprise software, AI/ML pipelines, cloud infrastructure, IoT systems, DevOps automation, and digital transformation consulting. Bw'oba weetaaga pulatifomu ejjudde okuzimbibwa okuva ku ntandikwa, oba okukwatagana okw'ekigendererwa n'ekitongole kyo ekiriwo, tukola ku kuzimba, okukulaakulanya, okugezesa, n'okukozesa.

stack.question: Tekinologiya wo omukulu kye ki?
stack.answer: Our core stack centers on enterprise-grade platforms: Azure and AWS for cloud, .NET and Node.js for backend, React and Angular for frontend, Kubernetes and Docker for orchestration, and Terraform for infrastructure as code. Era tukolera wamu ne Python ku mirimu gya AI/ML, Power BI ne Fabric ku by'obusuubuzi, ne PostgreSQL, SQL Server, ne MongoDB ku data.

enterprise.question: Okola otya pulojekiti za kkampuni?
enterprise.answer: Buli kaseera katandika n'omutendera gw'okuzuula obukulu, obuzimbe n'emitendera egy'enjawulo. Ofuna ttiimu ey'enjawulo erina obukulembeze bwa tekinologiya, okwekenneenya buli kiseera, n'okutuukirira butereevu ba yinginiya abazimba sisitemu yo. We follow agile sprints with stakeholder demos, maintain transparent project boards, and provide weekly progress reports.

support.question: Obuyambi bw'oluvanyuma lw'okutandika bufaanana butya?
support.answer: We offer structured support tiers with defined SLAs, including 24/7 monitoring, incident response, performance optimization, and feature iteration. Our support agreements cover bug fixes, security patches, infrastructure scaling, and proactive health checks — tailored to your uptime and response-time requirements.

integration.question: Osobola okukwatagana n'enteekateeka zaffe eziriwo?
integration.answer: Ddala ddala. We specialize in legacy modernization, API-first integrations, and hybrid cloud migrations. Bw'oba oyagala okukwatagana n'enteekateeka za ERP ez'enjawulo, okutambula okuva ku monoliths okudda ku microservices, oba okugatta ebiwandiiko eby'edda n'eby'omulembe eby'omulembe, tulina ebitabo by'okutambula n'obumanyirivu bw'okugatta okusobola okukifuula eky'omulembe.

industries.question: Bizinensi ki z'okoze?
industries.answer: Ttiimu yaffe ekoze pulojekiti mu fintech, eby'obulamu, eby'obusuubuzi, eby'amasannyalaze, n'ebitongole bya gavumenti. Tutegeera ebyetaago by'ekitongole nga PCI-DSS ey'okusasula, HIPAA ku bikwata ku by'obulamu, okugoberera GDPR ku butale bwa EU, n'obuweereza obw'ekiseera ekituufu ku IoT y'amakolero.

engagement.question: Enkola y'okwegatta efaanana etya?
engagement.answer: Kitegeeza nga bwâ€TMonootera okuzuula ebiruubirirwa byo nâ€TMebigendererwa byâ€TMolina. Okuva eyo, tuwaayo ekiwandiiko eky'okunoonyereza nga kirimu ebirowoozo by'okuzimba, obudde n'enkyukakyuka z'ebyensimbi. Bw'omala okukkirizibwa, tutandika n'ekibinja eky'okwewaddeyo, nga tuyingira mu bikozesebwa byo n'emirimu gyo, era tutandika okudduka okusooka mu nnaku ntono.

faq.ctaDescription: Olina pulojekiti mu birowoozo? Ka twogere ku bunene, obudde n'ensimbi.
